channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Accused in Thoothukudi teenager murder case moved to Madurai Central Prison
item.description: In Thoothukudi district, Tamil Nadu, the accused in the murder of a 17-year-old girl has been transferred to Madurai Central Prison. M. Dharma Muneeswaran, also known as Maveeran, hailing from Sayalku...

item.title: Tehran University professor urges India to take a stronger stand against the US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: The ongoing war involving the US and Israel against Iran, which has now entered its third week, has drawn significant attention globally. In an exclusive interview with Scroll’s Shoaib Daniyal, Dr. Fo...

item.title: Tanzania Takes a Major Step Towards Formal Recognition of Startups with New National Policy
item.description: Tanzania’s startup sector is entering a new chapter as the government and key ecosystem players work together to establish the country’s first National Startup Policy. For years, Tanzanian entrepreneu...

item.title: Buratai Says Terrorism Financiers Are Known but Names Not Released, Calls for Government Action
item.description: Former Nigerian Army Chief, Lt Gen Tukur Buratai (retd.), don yan say e no fit carry blame for why the names of people wey dey finance terrorism never dey released publicly. Buratai talk this one duri...

item.title: Variety Faces Backlash for Criticizing Chuck Norris’ Legacy After His Death
item.description: After the passing of actor and martial artist Chuck Norris at age 86, controversy erupted when Variety published an opinion piece contending that Norris’s political image and law-and-order themes have...

item.title: Fremantle Dockers Overpower Melbourne Demons in First-Half Blitz
item.description: The Fremantle Dockers delivered a stunning performance against the Melbourne Demons, securing a dominant 17.16 (118) to 10.10 (70) victory at Optus Stadium. The Dockers started the game with a breatht...

item.title: Experts Share Tips on Choosing the Right Trash Cans for a Clean Kitchen
item.description: In this article, interior designer Maia Roffey and waste management expert Shahan Fancy offer practical advice on selecting the right trash cans for the kitchen. They discuss the importance of plannin...

item.title: Ruto and Museveni Launch SGR Extension to Boost Regional Trade
item.description: President William Ruto and Uganda's President Yoweri Museveni were in Kisumu for the official groundbreaking of Phase 2C of the Standard Gauge Railway (SGR), which will stretch from Naivasha to the Ug...

item.title: Rodger Brulotte, longtime Quebec baseball broadcaster and Expos advocate, dies at 79
item.description: Rodger Brulotte, one of Quebec’s most beloved baseball voices, passed away at 79. Known for his energetic home-run call 'Bonsoir, elle est partie!' ('Good evening, it’s gone!'), Brulotte was a corners...

item.title: Labour's Internal Struggles Amid International Tensions
item.description: In the midst of international unrest, Sir Keir Starmer's Labour Party is struggling with internal division. The party's leadership is under scrutiny as politicians, including Angela Rayner, challenge ...

item.title: Creamline earns qualifying round seat following tough victory against Cignal in PVL
item.description: The Creamline Cool Smashers secured a qualifying round berth in the 2026 Premier Volleyball League (PVL) All-Filipino Conference after a hard-fought win against the Cignal Super Spikers. The match, he...

item.title: Pakistan Will Not Tolerate Terrorism From Afghanistan: CDF Munir
item.description: In a recent visit to Kurram, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Chief of Defence Forces (CDF) and Chief of Army Staff (COAS) Field Marshal Asim Munir reaffirmed Pakistan’s stance on national security, stating that t...

item.title: Peter Malinauskas wins historic South Australian election as One Nation overtakes Liberals
item.description: South Australian Premier Peter Malinauskas has achieved the largest electoral victory in the history of the state Labor Party, consolidating his leadership with a decisive win. The election also saw a...

item.title: African music stars to headline concert in Berlin
item.description: A major African music concert is scheduled to take place in Berlin, bringing together top artists from across the continent to showcase African sounds and culture on an international stage. The event ...

item.title: Trump signals possible reduction of US military operations in the Middle East amid ongoing conflict
item.description: US President Donald Trump has indicated that the United States is considering scaling back its military operations against Iran, but he remains opposed to a formal ceasefire. The comments come as the ...

item.title: Two persons killed after tanker and tipper truck collide on Lekki–Epe Expressway
item.description: For early Saturday morning, serious wahala happen for Sangotedo area for Lagos State as two people waka go meet their maker after one fuel-laden tanker and one tipper truck jam each other for Lekki–Ep...

item.title: Kerala CM Pinarayi Vijayan accuses Congress of helping BJP, questions Rahul Gandhi’s statements ahead of elections
item.description: Kerala Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan launched a scathing attack on the Congress party and its leader Rahul Gandhi, accusing them of behaving like the 'B-team of the BJP' as the state prepares for th...

item.title: US Renews Ties with Sahel Juntas Amid Hostage Release Efforts
item.description: President Donald Trump, now in his second term, has prioritised bringing home American hostages, leading to renewed but cautious diplomatic engagement with military-led states in the Sahel region, nam...

item.title: Farm Fresh Defeats Akari to Earn PVL Qualifying Round Berth
item.description: The Farm Fresh Foxies pulled off a significant upset in the Premier Volleyball League (PVL) All-Filipino Conference, ending the Akari Chargers’ impressive five-game winning streak. This victory secure...

item.title: Khloe Kardashian Opens Up About How Her Divorce Triggered Her Fitness Journey
item.description: Khloe Kardashian has shared that her journey towards fitness began after her 2013 divorce from Lamar Odom. The reality star explained that she used exercise as a coping mechanism to manage her stress ...
